positive: A majestic, highly detailed celestial owl with glowing cyan and gold accents, perched on a crescent moon silhouette. The owl's wings are spread in a powerful, stylized geometric pattern, suggesting flight and wisdom. Surrounding elements include stylized constellations, glowing nebula clouds in deep sapphire and amethyst tones, and wisps of cosmic smoke. The entire scene is rendered in a clean, high-contrast, black and gold neo-art deco style, optimized for a central, apparel-wearable print with strong graphic appeal. Minimal shading, maximum silhouette impact. Cosmic forest aesthetic. Highly detailed vector artwork, suitable for embroidery.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, muted colors, dirty, messy
